finalDetermination: Audit instrumentation added; static review did not confirm a stale-first-paint root cause without Denise device runtime evidence.

initialOwnershipSource.locationAwareness: refreshGridlyPortraitLocationAwarenessPanel consuming the shared community awareness summary

authoritativeOwnershipSource.canonicalIncidentOwnership: active-state evidence ownership when present; otherwise current shared active-awareness model scoped by active county and awareness area

replacementTrigger: Runtime audit records replacement when first rendered text differs from later authoritative text in the same refresh cycle.
refreshBudgetImpact: No material static budget attribution confirmed; runtime impact is measured as lastRefreshBudgetImpactMs if stale first paint is observed.
rootCause: Unconfirmed. Existing V734/V735/V736 reuse paths remain intact; added instrumentation distinguishes cached first-paint ownership from authoritative ownership before patching behavior.
whatChanged: Added V737 first-paint and ownership instrumentation for Awareness Brief, Community Pulse, Location Awareness, and localized intelligence.
Added V737 audit payload to gridlyRefreshBreakdownAudit.
Added validation script and audit report artifacts.
whatDidNotChange: No Dispatch Board, DriveTexas, Transportation Intelligence, historical reads/UI, Route Watch, or report lifecycle changes.
mergeRecommendation: Merge for instrumentation-only audit. Patch behavior only if Denise runtime evidence shows stale first paint with material replacement timing.
